subcodes.first_line: In truth, after thy departure, the real nature of this prison became manifest and evident. Some engaged in lamentation and moaning, while others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه بعد از شما سجنیت سجن ظاهر و هویدا گشت جمعی بناله و حنین مشغول و برخی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
